Welcome to 1918 Bistro & Grill

A True Barossa Valley Food and Wine Experience

Rich in heritage with an abundance of culture and local produce, 1918 Bistro & Grill is a gathering place celebrating the Barossa Valley’s finest.

Occupying a 100 year old home and boasting roaring open fires, the charming ambience, hearty fare and friendly service has long been enjoyed by Barossans.

The 1918 family are passionate about serving the freshest, seasonally inspired, local cuisine. This is complimented by a wine list featuring back vintages of some of the Barossa Valley's most remarkable family owned and produced wines.

With its youthful passion and buzz, modern Australian tastes and flavours and our staff's genuine willingness to please, our iconic family owned Barossa restaurant is a must visit for anyone seeking an authentic experience.

merchant_editorial: Welcome to Il Camino... The name Il Camino, translates to the fireplace, perfectly depicting the true essence of our restaurant. Much like the purpose of a fireplace, we believe our restaurant is a place for you to gather and enjoy life with delicious warming food and surrounded by the people you love. Opening our restaurant in April of 2020, we started our journey as the humble takeaway pizzeria due to the unprecedented circumstances covid brought to the hospitality industry. However, with the fantastic support of our local community, our vision for our 'fireplace' restaurant was able to become an incredible reality. "We have grown up with a big table full of food and family, and we had always envisioned this tradition for our restaurant.” - Co-Owner, Benedetto Danzuso Our passion for food derives from our Italian heritage and our love of family. When you visit Il Camino, you might feel as if you have been transported into the depths of Italy with the sounds of thick Italian dialects pouring out of the kitchen and pizza bar. Our staff, who have quickly become like family, originate from various regions from the northern parts of Torino, right to the south of Sicilia. When you dine with us, you'll not only indulge in the tastes of Italy but also in our culture and passion. From our freshly made pasta, to our authentic wood-oven pizzas and our delectable desserts. With an exceptional wine list and drinks menu curated to complement the flavours showcased, we know your experience with Il Camino will be a memorable one.

name: Smiling Samoyed Brewery eGift Card
title: 14% off
subtitle: Enjoy 14% off
merchant_editorial:
Smiling Samoyed Brewery is a family-owned award winning brewery. Every single drop of Smiling Samoyed beer, in both kegs or in bottles, has been made and packaged on site at Myponga. Visitors can see the brewery through a window from the dining room and can even see the brewers in action on the brew-house on occasion.

Smiling Samoyed Brewery was founded in 2012 by husband and wife team, Simon Dunstone and Kate Henning, after a home brewing hobby got out of control.

The brewery and brewery bar quickly earned a reputation for excellent craft beers, delicious food and fantastic atmosphere. We proudly host special celebrations for our guests including wedding receptions and birthdays. There are a range of beers sure to please every palate including ’12 Paws’ Pale Ale, a Dark Ale, an Australian Kolsch and an IPA and our brewery bar also stocks a range of local wines, ciders, spirits and soft drinks.  Our beers are available in a variety of good beer venues around South Australia.

The brewery is named after Simon and Kate’s Samoyed dogs who have become much-loved mascots at the brewery. The original ’12 Paws’ of the brewery were Mia, Cooper and Poppet. Our current Ambassa-dogs are Hoppy and Kent. Hoppy came through the RSPCA SA in 2014 as a 6 month old puppy and has proudly served as the Ambassador for the RSPCA Million Paws Walk as well as being awarded Brewery Dog of the Year in 2018. Kent joined the family from Nordicharm Samoyeds in 2019.

name: Mylk Bar
title: Up to $30
subtitle: Enjoy 25% off
merchant_editorial:
The Mylk Bar hails from the early 1900’s delicatessens throughout Melbourne and Sydney.
Mylk Bar takes all your favourite old fast-food treats and wraps them up in a
vibrant new dining experience! One that promises everything from the classic
Cheese Burger, BLT and Hotdog to Onion Rings, Crinkle cut chips or a mouth-
watering side of Macaroni & Cheese.
But that is just through the daylight hours.  At night, Mylk Bar comes alive again
transforming into a tapas and boutique wine venue that offers soulful food and
cool live jazz. Influenced by Mediterranean flavours and using fresh local produce,
the Mylk Bar chefs will create the ultimate relaxed shared-menu experience.
Mylk Bar’s homage to a bygone era extends beyond the rustic décor and venue fit.
